chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1462 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5718/2022 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 12.09.2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 22.11.2022. Thereafter no such efforts were taken by the Petitioners or their Counsel to get the matter fixed in Court for hearing. After filing instant Petition in the year, 2022, the same is pending without any useful progress. The conduct of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
